title: gymnocalycium monvillei subsp. monvillei
intro: Gymnocalycium monvillei subsp. monvillei, commonly known as the living rock, is a type of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Gymnocalycium monvillei subsp. monvillei include reducing pain, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a powder or infusion for use in herbal remedies, and can also be found in some commercial products due to its potential medicinal properties.
